subject: Re: Error during running M with MCore
body:
Hi Kareem,
Not sure exactly why but something is crashing during species prep, I’ve run the tutorial recently without issue so I suggest restarting your M setup and carefully checking all arguments
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Apr 10, 2025, at 06:14, Kareem Farghaly <kareem.fr1@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hello,
I am currently going through Warp/M tutorial and I have an error while running M with MCore to check if everything is imported correctly. 
This is what I use
: MCore --population m/10491.population --iter 0
and this is what I get back
:
Loading population... Done
Creating directories... Done
Spawning workers... Done
Preparing for refinement – this will take a few minutes per species
Preparing refinement requisites...
0/1Unhandled exception. System.Exception: BadRequest: System.Net.Http.HttpConnectionResponseContent
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.SendCommand(NamedSerializableObject command) in /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpLib/WorkerWrapper.cs:line 231
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.MPAPrepareSpecies(String path, String stagingSave) in /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpLib/WorkerWrapper.cs:line 444
   at MCore.MCore.<>c__DisplayClass16_2.<DoProcessing>b__1(Int32 ispecies, Int32 threadID) in /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/MCore/MCore.cs:line 359
   at Warp.Tools.Helper.<>c__DisplayClass51_0.<ForCPU>b__0(Object id) in /usr/share/miniconda/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1737588682413/work/WarpLib/Tools/Helper.cs:line 719
Aborted (core dumped)
I can't determine what actually is going wrong as all the previous steps went smoothly.
Thanks in advance.
Best regards,
Kareem
